description: This file provides shared error handling helpers for a Node.js/Express backend, including functions to convert errors into standardized API error responses, map error types to HTTP status codes, and send JSON error responses.

methods.name: _toErrorResponse
methods.description: Converts an error object into a standardized ErrorResponse payload, avoiding sensitive info leakage.

methods.name: _zodDetails
methods.description: Extracts details from a Zod validation error in a stable shape.

methods.name: _statusForError
methods.description: Maps known error types and codes to HTTP status codes (400, 404, 422, 500).

methods.name: sendError
methods.description: Sends a standardized JSON error response with appropriate HTTP status based on error type.
